_comment: Octobots agent registry. Each entry maps an agent id to a published GitHub repo and a pinned ref (commit SHA, tag, or branch). Used by install.sh and scout during onboarding.

agents.description: Kit — codebase scout and project configurator
Max — orchestrates tasks, routes work, tracks progress
Alex — requirements, user stories, acceptance criteria
Rio — technical decomposition, interface design, code review
OneTest QA — 13 specialist domains (a11y, security, UX, performance, privacy...)
PA — second-brain personal assistant: signals, knowledge base, open loops

presets.name: Full-stack web team
presets.description: PM + BA + Tech Lead + Python Dev + JS Dev + QA

presets.name: Python backend team
presets.description: PM + Tech Lead + Python Dev + QA

presets.name: Minimal starter
presets.description: PM + Python Dev — quickstart, expand later

presets.name: Personal assistant only
presets.description: Solo PA — second-brain / journaling / inbox triage
